blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How much abuse must a child endure to utter such words?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: From that day on, those words became a sort of spell. Every time my adoptive father beat me, I would say, 'You can kill me if you want.' Then he would stop hitting me with an angry look and leave. Hehe, I just lived like that. When I was twelve, thirteen, and until I left home at seventeen.
That's about my age now.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Yes, it's the age to open one's eyes to the world. Then, one day, I finally realized the meaning of what my adoptive father had done to me all along. Or maybe I already knew, which is why I never asked for anything.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone could guess by now. Marsha's adoptive father had harbored an unthinkable and terrible thought.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Foolishly. If he wanted to, he should have just done it openly. Then he wouldn't have been entangled in such filth for 17 years. In the end, he was just a pathetic coward who couldn't do anything.
Marsha spoke calmly, her emotions restrained.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: You can hug me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Did your adoptive father do that?

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Hehe, strangely enough, there's no twist in such stories. He pounced on me as if he had been waiting, and I stabbed him in the throat with the knife. Honestly, I didn't feel anything. Then I left home and wandered around the world until I ended up here.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone's heart was heavy. Hearing the story firsthand from the person involved brought an indescribable sense of outrage, unlike anything he had only read about in books or heard through rumors.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Um, I don't know what to say...

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: It's okay! I'm getting by now. My adoptive father is dead, but the kleptomania doesn't go away easily. I've had my share of trouble because of it. Sigh.
As Marsha laughed cheerfully, Shirone felt better too.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: If it's an unforgettable pain, embracing it might be one way to deal with it. You're doing your best to overcome the pain, and the kleptomania will disappear soon.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thanks for understanding. If you had any plans to do something to me tonight, you would have been completely fooled.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: No! I really...

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No! I really...

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Having a brother like you wouldn't be boring.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Me too. In fact, I even thought Marsha really felt like my real sister.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Hehe! Thanks.
Shirone was sincere. Having seen the relationship between Rian and Reina, he had thought it would be nice to have siblings.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Would it feel like this to have a sister? Her every word and action comforted Shirone's heart.
In the meantime, the bartender, who had gone into a room, came out.

blocks.speaker: Bartender
blocks.content: The Gamos alert has been lifted. Seems he found a woman to his liking and returned to his mansion to throw a party.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Phew, it's good it wasn't too late.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Marsha glanced at Shirone with a sly look.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Hmph, seems you really hated being with me? Just a moment ago, you were using your baby voice, begging, 'Marsha sis, please become my real sister.'

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I didn't say it like that.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone felt the same regret. It was the first time he had lost track of time talking to a woman, given he wasn't used to them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But for the sake of the household staff waiting at the villa, holding their stomachs, he had to leave.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Do you think we can meet again?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course. What, afraid I'll run away in the middle of the sea? If you're bored, come visit. I plan to stay here for a while.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Haha! Then, I'll take my leave.
As Shirone hurried out of the bar, Marsha ordered a strong drink with a relaxed expression.
As expected, two men who had been eyeing her approached as if they had been waiting.

blocks.speaker: Man 1
blocks.content: You're quite a catch. Because of you, I ended up paying more for drinks than usual.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Booking a room? This place isn't safe for a woman alone. How about I join you?

blocks.speaker: Man 2
blocks.content: What? You done talking? Want to get a proper beating tonight?
One of the men grabbed a bottle from the table and raised it upside down.
With all eyes on her, Marsha sighed inaudibly and then suddenly changed her tone, laughing coquettishly.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Hahaha! Fine, let's go to a room. But are just two of you enough? If you have friends, why don't you bring them along?

blocks.speaker: Man 1
blocks.content: What, what?

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Bring them. 10? No, even 20 is fine. I'll entertain you all night long. I hate it when things get cut off halfway.
The men were displeased without even understanding why. But Marsha knew. When sexual competition intensifies, males reveal their inherent weakness.

blocks.speaker: Man 2
blocks.content: What, damn. Is she crazy? Let's go.

blocks.speaker: Man 1
blocks.content: Ah, such bad luck.
As the men walked away, Marsha watched them with a look of disdain and then turned away.
The drink she had ordered was already served. Downing it in one gulp, the fire blazed through her throat, warming her senses.

blocks.speaker: Bartender
blocks.content: Are you Marsha?

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Hehe, is there another Marsha?

blocks.speaker: Bartender
blocks.content: I heard you're wanted by the Magic Association and have been evading capture until now. Decided to come in for good?

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: No. I'll leave soon. Just came to settle some things.

blocks.speaker: Bartender
blocks.content: Preferably, keep it quiet. If someone of your caliber causes a commotion, it'll disturb the island. We don't want the agreement to break. If you promise to cooperate, we'll let you stay here for a while.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Forget it. I never planned to stay here in the first place.
The bartender wiped a beer glass until it squeaked.

blocks.speaker: Bartender
blocks.content: The boy will be disappointed.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: Hehe. It's okay. At that age, it's normal to experience heartbreak.

blocks.speaker: Bartender
blocks.content: I thought you both were getting along?

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: It was fun. Ah, to be honest, it was a bit dangerous.
Marsha hugged her shoulders and looked up at the ceiling.

blocks.speaker: Marsha
blocks.content: How can there be such disgusting people?
The villa was as quiet as if no one was there.
Amy sat on the sofa next to the fireplace, and Rian and Tess couldn't even bring themselves to start a conversation, wary of her mood.
Shirone was nowhere to be seen. It had already been 2 hours since he went out to shop; unless he was fetching fish from the sea, it was well past the time he should have returned.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Sh-Shirone is late, isn't he?
Trying to thaw the frozen atmosphere, Tess spoke up and was startled by her own voice, which seemed louder than usual.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Trying to thaw the frozen atmosphere, Tess spoke up and was startled by her own voice, which seemed louder than usual.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Yet, Amy remained motionless, staring into the darkness.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ugh, it's like walking on thin ice here.
Tess shivered, feeling the cold as if Amy's bad mood was palpable.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Of course, as a woman, she could fully understand. Regardless of the trip being for couples, this was supposed to be an exciting first holiday for the two, wasn't it?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone, you were too inconsiderate. I'm disappointed in you too. Tch!

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Birds of a feather flock together, and Tess sided with Amy.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: She knew how much Amy had conceded to Shirone, even when there was a conflict of opinion at the harbor. Despite that, she readily offered to cook. Men might think that it's a small thing, but from a woman's perspective, it was the most sincere act of wanting to reconcile quickly.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Ah, I'm hungry. Why isn't he coming? Should I go look for him?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Nevermind. We might just miss each other.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Really? Then can I eat the potatoes I brought?

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Why are you so thoughtless? Think about Amy.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What's so serious? Shirone had more to deal with than me. It's normal for him to be late.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: Even if Shirone had more to do, he's smarter than you, so it's only normal for him to return sooner. So, it's a serious issue! You just go munch on potatoes or chew on turnips in the corner.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Why are you so angry? What did I do?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Sorry, it's my fault. You guys go ahead and eat. I'll wait for Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: We can't do that. It was supposed to be a cooking contest.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But Rian is hungry. It's Shirone's fault for being late anyway. Let's just consider it our loss.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: It's okay, Amy. Honestly, I'm not even hungry. Just deal with that glutton somehow.

Rian was indeed chewing on a raw potato in the corner. Unable to even perform Schema but possessing equivalent physical strength, he required several times the calorie intake of an average person to maintain his massive strength.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why isn't he coming? Is something wrong?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone wasn't one to break promises. Nor was he foolish enough to waste time due to a mistake.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: There must have been an unavoidable circumstance.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But no matter how much she tried to compose herself, she couldn't help feeling neglected.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You're the one who brought me here. Besides you, everyone else is someone I met today.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: She felt lonely. Although she had become friendly with Rian and Tess, their partnership had a level of understanding that Amy couldn't intrude upon.
Thump, thump. Thump, thump.
Someone knocked on the door. Tess's face lit up, and Rian clenched his fist, thinking he could finally eat.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone? Wait a sec...
Before Tess could finish, Amy walked to the door. With her eyes narrowed, she flung open the door and yelled.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Hey! Where have you been all this time... Huh?
Amy blinked, the door wide open.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: What? Why are you here?
Zis's face turned red. Of all people, he hadn't expected her to answer the door.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Recalling the day's events made his teeth clench, but seeing her in casual clothes, his heart fluttered again.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Regaining his composure, Zis looked around the villa with a brazen attitude. Despite the pain in his abdomen from Falcoa's beating, his expression remained unfazed.

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: Wow, this place is really nice. Nobles are different, aren't they?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What do you want? How did you know we were here?

blocks.speaker: Zis
blocks.content: I asked around. For the ruler of the harbor, Zis, finding this place was no big deal. Now you know how well-acquainted I am with the island, right?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: So? You came all this way just to show off that one trick?
